subject: [RFC PATCH v2 0/5] mm/swap, memcg: Introduce swap tiers for cgroup based swap control

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the complexity of adding an interface to memory cgroups, suggesting that BPF would be more flexible and future-proof.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: Introduce swap tiers for cgroup-based swap control, enabling flexible assignment of swap devices to workloads.
